nasb.text: Of Asher he said, “More blessed than sons is Asher; May he be favored by his brothers, And may he dip his foot in oil.

esv.text: And of Asher he said, “Most blessed of sons be Asher; let him be the favorite of his brothers, and let him dip his foot in oil.

cnv.text: 論到亞設，他說： “願亞設蒙福，勝過眾子， 願他得兄弟的喜悅； 願他把腳蘸在油中。

ccb.text: 摩西祝福亚设支派说： “愿亚设在众子中最蒙福， 受众弟兄的恩待， 双脚沐浴橄榄油，
